query: Find open issues that are duplicates of each other and propose a canonical issue to keep.
expected_behavior: Applies the DUPLICATE classifier with three signals (D1: title token Jaccard >= 0.80, D2: same Closes-trailer match, D3: same reporter / body cosine >= 0.7 within 30 days).
Identifies the canonical issue (oldest open OR the one closed by a merged PR) and proposes closing the others as duplicates.
Drafts per-duplicate close comment in the form: 'Closing as duplicate of #<canonical> — discussion consolidated there.' with suggested_close_reason: completed.
Surfaces results in a markdown table grouped by canonical issue; does NOT close anything; chains into close-superseded-issues via the sidecar.
